mapper.sql: id::text AS id, url, alt, filename, content_type AS "mimeType", size, source_type AS "sourceType", created_at AS "createdAt", created_by::text AS "createdBy"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM image WHERE id = ANY(${ids}::bigint[])
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image (url, alt, filename, content_type, size, source_type, created_by) VALUES (#{url}, #{alt}, #{filename}, #{mimeType}, #{size}, #{sourceType}, ${createdBy}) RETURNING
